alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; demonstrated ability to work across cross-functional stakeholder groups
alignments.job_requirement: Develop customer relationships and build internal partnerships with account executives and teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product operations leader with experience in requirements design, UAT, rollout, and transformation program execution; able to operate at multiple stakeholder levels
alignments.job_requirement: Experienced in use case discovery, scoping, and delivering complex solution architecture designs to multiple audiences requiring context switching in levels of technical depth

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience with transformation programs and scaling operations; no explicit evidence of creating technical reference architectures or demo applications
alignments.job_requirement: Scale best practices in your field and support customers by authoring reference architectures, how-tos, and demo applications

gaps.gap: Core programming language proficiency (Python, Java, Scala) is a stated requirement; candidate has basic Python and is actively learning, not production proficiency
gaps.mitigation: Intensive self-directed learning in Python and Apache Spark; pairing with senior engineers; structured coursework on Spark fundamentals and big data analytics

gaps.gap: No hands-on expertise with Big Data Analytics technologies or complex proofs-of-concept delivery; background is operations and transformation, not data platform implementation
gaps.mitigation: Dedicated onboarding to Databricks platform, Spark, and big data use cases; customer shadowing; building proof-of-concept experience in a non-customer-facing capacity

gaps.gap: Vietnamese language proficiency is required for direct customer communications; no evidence candidate speaks Vietnamese
gaps.mitigation: If candidate does not speak Vietnamese, role is disqualifying. If language proficiency exists but not documented, verify immediately before proceeding

gaps.gap: Limited field engineering, solutions architecture, or sales engineering background; positioning is strategy and operations, not customer-facing technical sales
gaps.mitigation: Formal solutions architect training; mentoring from experienced SAs; gradual customer exposure with strong internal support

gaps.gap: No explicit public cloud platform (AWS, Azure, GCP) experience documented; role requires hands-on expertise
gaps.mitigation: Cloud certification program; cloud platform fundamentals courses; lab-based learning in major cloud environments

output.summary: This candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with ~8 years of transformation and commercial scaling experience at Google, but the Solutions Architect role is a field engineering / technical sales position requiring hands-on proficiency in Python, Apache Spark, big data analytics, and public cloud platforms—none of which align with the candidate's background. Vietnamese language is a stated requirement and is not documented. The role family fit is low; the technical and domain gaps are severe and would require substantial ramp time, and the function (solutions architecture / field engineering) falls outside the target and approved-stretch families. Advisory recommendation is skip unless Vietnamese fluency and prior big data platform experience can be confirmed.
